## What happened
KOLN reported on 20 February 2026 that Lincoln, Nebraska police are investigating after a local woman’s dog was poisoned.

## Key facts
- Affected animals: dogs.
- Police are investigating the incident.
- The case is also linked to a burglary, according to KLKN-TV coverage.

## What pet owners should do
Monitor pets for sudden vomiting, lethargy, seizures, or behavioral changes; secure your home and yard; report suspected poisoning or trespassing to local police and a vet.
